summary: Full backend + frontend testing of MK Agropecuária site. 9/9 backend pytest tests pass; all 5 frontend pages render, navigation works, products filter correct subsets, contact form validates and submits to /api/contact (200), success toast & clear; floating WhatsApp FAB present on all pages with correct wa.me number; ScrollToTop verified.

issues: Rating shown as '4,8/5' (BR locale - correct). Reviews count text '80 avaliações no Google' visible. No issues.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Nav-link data-testids include Portuguese accents (e.g. nav-link-serviços, nav-link-início). Works in browser but harder for automation. Consider slugifying labels (servicos, inicio).
OPTIONAL: Cleanup TEST_ prefixed contact_messages and status_checks created during testing if desired.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); should migrate to lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
ContactMessage model: email is Optional[str] in stored model but ContactMessageCreate uses EmailStr - fine. No _id leakage anywhere (find queries exclude _id).
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True - browsers will reject; prefer explicit origins for production.
Frontend: WhatsAppFab is defined as named export only; default export also present - ok. All required data-testids exist.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contact messages and a TEST_pytest status check during automated runs (~3-4 docs). Safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_mk_api.py (pytest). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_mk_api.py -v. All 9 pass. Frontend uses BR-Portuguese; rating displayed '4,8' (comma). Nav testids use accented chars - use direct page.goto for navigation in playwright. Public URL: https://mk-pet-agropecuaria.preview.emergentagent.com.
